title: Gond
bodyText:
God of craft; the civic religion of Koviz. Symbol: a **toothed cog with 4 spokes** — every person a cog in the machine that keeps the town alive. PROGRESS · WORK · INNOVATION · COMMITMENT. Spoke directly to G, Yena, and Roman: told them **Lathandar had been captured** and pointed them at the cult. Whether Gond is still paying attention is an open question.
